title: Home (v3)
summary: Architect-primary home composition demonstrating all 8 differentiation moves from the design brief: capability sentence naming the commerce × harness-engineering intersection, live signals strip, 11 CURRENT receipts topic-grouped, Signal Dispatch surfacing, topic anchors, footer with methodology meta-receipt.

strategy.decision: Replace v2's four-pursuit creative-polymath bento grid with a single architect-primary composition: editorial-serif capability sentence + live runtime signals strip + topic-grouped receipt list (Lopopolo pattern) + recent Signal Dispatch + proto-framework topic anchors + meta-receipt footer.
strategy.why: Closes D1 (home tells wrong story), D2 (/ai unreachable — surfaces via nav), D4 (no scoped contact path — single Cal.com CTA), D5 (DESIGN.md and live / divergent — fresh editorial-warm direction), and D8 (receipt density hidden). Implements P0-1 + P1-1 + P1-4 from 02-prescription.yml. Demonstrates all 8 differentiation moves per the 2026-05-25 user decision: subject intersection (1), receipt volume (2), methodology meta-receipt (3, footer), live runtime signals (4), speaking nav (5 — page lives at /speaking), AI chat FAB (6, persistent), show-the-kitchen (7, methodology repos linked alongside products), editorial serif (8, GT Sectra for capability + post titles).
strategy.shipped: src/routes/+page.svelte currently renders a bento grid with 4 equal-weight pursuits (Photography / Music / Writing / Building), volleyball hero-photo rotation, lime accent, mailto contact. Pre-existing copy still says 'hosted on Vercel' (drift — site is on Cloudflare).
strategy.gap: v2 reads hobbyist polymath; v3 reads practicing architect with shipped breadth. Bento → topic-grouped receipt list. Hero photo → no photo. Lime → copper. mailto → Cal.com. 4 surfaces → 11 surfaces.
strategy.question: Does the editorial serif treatment land as 'architect-who-writes' or read as overdesigned? Stage 4 fact-check + stakeholder review answers.

currentState.summary: v2 home: bento grid with 4 creative pursuits, hero photo rotation, lime accent, unstructured mailto.
currentState.annotation: v3 retires bento + hero rotation + lime + mailto entirely. Editorial-warm system from clean slate (per resolved Q2).
